from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_8e5a5113(I):
    x1 = crop(I, ORIGIN, THREE_BY_THREE)
    x2 = rot90(x1)
    x3 = rot180(x1)
    x4 = astuple(x2, x3)
    x5 = astuple(FOUR, EIGHT)
    x6 = apply(tojvec, x5)
    x7 = apply(asobject, x4)
    x8 = mpapply(shift, x7, x6)
    O = paint(I, x8)
    return O
